ONBOARDINGCONFIG_476__ADMINSHAVEFULL: Admins have full access to view and modify everything in the Admin Dashboard. Aside from you, should anyone else have full access and control over all aspects of your travel program?

ONBOARDINGCONFIG_539__WHENYOUREON:
When you’re on the road, we’ve got your back, no matter the time or day. Our
              support team is always just a tap away and can be reached via chat or phone in less than a minute.
ONBOARDINGCONFIG_541__ATRAVELPOLICY: A travel policy lets you set limits on the kind of travel your employees can book. While the vast majority of our companies rely on our rewards to encourage their employees to book the right kind of travel, some companies may want to set limits.
ONBOARDINGCONFIG_542__YOUCANSET: You can set limits for three groups: Default, Director, and Executive. Then you can bucket your employees into these groups however you’d like!
ONBOARDINGCONFIG_547__TOSAVEMONEY: To save money on flights, we recommend your employees book several days in advance. But, don’t make them book too far in advance, as business travel is often unpredictable! For employees who travel last minute, you’ll likely add them to your “Director” or “Executive” group.  How far in advance should flights be booked?
ONBOARDINGCONFIG_548__FORCOMPANIESLIKE: For companies like yours, we recommend 3 days in advance for Default and whenever for Director/Executive
ONBOARDINGCONFIG_552__SEEHOWIT: See how it impacts your travelers
ONBOARDINGCONFIG_554__HOTELPRICESCHANGE: Hotel prices change from month to month, city to city, making it hard to set the right cap. Luckily, a cap is rarely needed, as the
ONBOARDINGCONFIG_555__PRICETOBEAT: Price To Beat encourages your employees to book with your company’s interests in mind. For this reason, most companies similar to yours choose not to set a price cap for hotels.
ONBOARDINGCONFIG_556__APRICECAP: A price cap that’s this low often makes for a bad traveler experience. We recommend increasing this cap to avoid a risky launch.
ONBOARDINGCONFIG_557__SEEHOWIT: See how it impacts your travelers
ONBOARDINGCONFIG_559__NOWTHATYOUVE: Now that you’ve defined a custom policy, which employees should be in your Director or Executive groups? All other employees will be in your

ONBOARDINGCONFIG_563__YOURCOMPANY: ! Your company policy is all set. To modify your policy or make more advanced changes, simply come back to the Policy tab.

POLICY_577__WHATSHOULDBE: What should be considered a short flight?

This
          field cannot be less than zero
POLICY_581__WHYSHOULDI: Why should I set up policies?
POLICY_582__ATRAVELPOLICY:
A travel policy lets you set limits on the kind of travel your
              employees can book. You can set limits for three groups: Default, Director, and Executive. Then you can
              bucket your employees into these groups however you’d like!

is looking for flights that leave tomorrow, but his
                  company’s policy requests all bookings to be made
POLICY_587__SOEVERY:
, so every flight will be

POLICY_591__BOOKINGANDCAN:
booking and can cancel it. You can choose how to get requests for each kind of

POLICY_593__BOOKINGSOUTSIDEOF: Bookings outside of these parameters are Out of Policy.
POLICY_596__SETUPA: Set up a percentage cap on top of median price
POLICY_598__BASEDONOUR: Based on our analysis, we recommend a minimum value of 20% to account for price fluctuations. Values below 10% provide insufficient flexibility to travelers.
POLICY_603__MAXIMUMPRICEWILL:
Maximum price will overrule when it is lower than Dynamic Policy. Allow Dynamic Policy to determine Maximum
          price by setting this to "0".
POLICY_619__SETAPERCENTAGE: Set a percentage on top of the price
POLICY_621__THISFIELDCANNOT: This field cannot be less than zero
POLICY_629__THISFIELDCANNOT: This field cannot be less than zero
POLICY_640__FOREVERYBOOKING: For every booking, approval is not required
POLICY_642__ONLYOUTOF: Only Out of Policy bookings can be declined
POLICY_646__ALLBOOKINGSARE: All bookings are declined automatically if not approved
POLICY_648__ONLYOUTOF: Only Out of Policy bookings are declined automatically if not approved
POLICY_649__THEPOLICYDETAILS: The policy details could not be saved. Please check you filled everything correctly and then try again.
POLICY_653__AREYOUSURE: Are you sure you want to revert?
POLICY_657__DYNAMICPOLICYIS:
Dynamic Policy is a unique way to control your travel spend. For any hotel search, we look at all
            reasonable results and then our algorithm calculates a Median Price, or the fair price for the search.
POLICY_658__BYADDINGA:
By adding a percentage on top of the Median Price, you can control when an Out of Policy warning is
            shown to your travelers. We recommend choosing 20%.
POLICY_659__EXAMPLEIFTHE:
Example: If the Median Price of a search result is $100 and the Dynamic
          Policy is set at 20%, prices
          higher than $120 will be flagged as Out of Policy.
POLICY_660__DYNAMICPOLICYIS:
Dynamic Policy is a unique way to control your travel spend. For any flight search, we look at all
            reasonable results and then our algorithm calculates a Median Price, or the fair price for the search.
POLICY_661__BYADDINGA:
By adding a percentage on top of the Median Price, you can control when an Out of Policy warning is
            shown to your travelers. We recommend choosing 20%.
POLICY_662__EXAMPLEIFTHE:
Example: If the Median Price of a search result is $100 and the Dynamic
          Policy is set at 20%, prices
          higher than $120 will be flagged as Out of Policy.
POLICY_664__APRICECAP:
A price cap for hotels is rarely needed, as the TripActions ‘Price To Beat’ encourages your travelers to
              book with your company’s interests in mind. For this reason, most companies similar to yours choose not
              to set this up.
POLICY_665__TAXESANDFEES:
Taxes and fees are not included in the maximum price cap policy. If your employees choose a hotel within
              the maximum cap but the price increases because of taxes, the booking will still be in policy.
POLICY_666__THEEXCEPTIONIS:
The exception is for regions where a total price for the booking is shown instead of a per night price. In
              that case
              taxes and fees are included in the maximum price cap policy.
POLICY_668__SETANABSOLUTE:
Set an absolute daily price per car to encourage your employees to book with your company’s interests in
              mind.
POLICY_669__ALTERNATIVELYWERECOMMEND:
Alternatively, we recommend setting a Dynamic
                Policy to give your travelers the best car options. If Dynamic Policy is enabled then the lowest of the two values is used as the maximum price.
POLICY_670__TAXESANDFEES:
Taxes and fees are not included in the maximum price cap policy. If your employees choose a car within
              the maximum cap but the price increases because of taxes, the booking will still be in policy.
POLICY_672__SETGLOBALOR: Set global or currency specific maximum price per booking to encourage your travelers to book with your company's interests in mind.
POLICY_673__ALTERNATIVELYWERECOMMEND:
Alternatively, we recommend setting a Dynamic
                Policy to give your travelers the best flight options. If Dynamic Policy is enabled then the lowest of the two values is used as the maximum price.
POLICY_674__TAXESANDFEES: Taxes and fees are included in the maximum price cap policy for flights.
POLICY_676__TOIMPROVEYOUR:
To improve your shopping experience, we are working with industry experts to
      enable better comparison of airline product quality.
POLICY_677__THESEFARESARE: These fares are generally related to Base, Standard and Enhanced fares.
POLICY_678__WHENSELECTINGTHIS:
When selecting this class, your travelers will be able to book In Policy flights up to Base, Standard and Enhanced
        fares. If they book above, their flight will be Out of Policy.
POLICY_680__THESEFARESARE: These fares are generally related to Enhanced and Premium fares.
POLICY_681__WHENSELECTINGTHIS:
When selecting this class, your travelers will be able to book In Policy flights up to Enhanced and Premium fares. If
        they book above, their flight will be Out of Policy.
POLICY_682__THESEFARESARE: These fares are generally related to Premium and Luxury fares.
POLICY_683__WHENSELECTINGTHIS:
When selecting this class, your travelers will be able to book In Policy flights up to Premium and Luxury fares. If they
        book above, their flight will be Out of Policy.
POLICY_684__THESEFARESARE: These fares are generally related to Luxury and Ultra Lux fares.
POLICY_685__WHENSELECTINGTHIS:
When selecting this class, your travelers will be able to book In Policy flights up to Luxury and Ultra Lux fares. They
        won't have any restriction on class type fares.
POLICY_687__ALLOWTRAVELERSTO:
Allow travelers to book a higher cabin class if the price is cheaper or equal
        to their maximum allowed cabin.
POLICY_688__INTHISEXAMPLE: In this example, 3 stars upgrade is cheaper than 2 stars:
POLICY_689__ALLOWUPGRADEIF: Allow upgrade if not too expensive
POLICY_690__ALLOWTRAVELERSTO:
Allow travelers to book a higher cabin class if the price is not more than X%
        higher than their maximum allowed cabin.
POLICY_691__INTHISEXAMPLE: In this example, up to 10% on top of the price is allowed:
POLICY_692__NOTETHATTHE:
Note that the price threshold is still determined by your master settings for
      dynamic price or max price. The cabin upgrade feature refers to those settings first and then the cabin upgrade
      settings to determine whether or not something is in or out of policy.
POLICY_694__ALLOWTRAVELERSTO:
Allow travelers to upgrade their assigned seat to a more comfortable one
          within the chosen cabin class.
POLICY_695__WHYSHOULDI: Why should I set up lead time?
POLICY_696__PRICESTENDTO:
Prices tend to go up towards check in date. Booking earlier is usually cheaper. Here you can define how
              many days before the check in date a hotel becomes out of policy. For a Default traveler our
              recommendation is to set it at 7 days.
POLICY_697__PRICESTENDTO:
Prices tend to go up towards check in date. Booking earlier is usually cheaper. Here you can define how
              many days before the check in date a hotel becomes out of policy. For a Director traveler our
              recommendation is to set this at 2 days.
POLICY_698__PRICESTENDTO:
Prices tend to go up towards check in date. Booking earlier is usually cheaper. Here you can define how
              many days before the check in date a hotel becomes out of policy. For an Executive traveler our
              recommendation is to set this at 0 days.
POLICY_699__FORCARRENTALS:
For car rentals the Lead time setting is not that relevant because prices don’t change as much as flights and
          hotels. We recommend to do not set a limit of time and keep this setting to 0 days.
POLICY_700__BOOKINGEARLYIS:
Booking early is ideal as fares tend to go up closer to departure date. Here you can define how many days
              before departure a flight becomes Out of Policy. For a Default traveler our
              recommendation is to set the lead time at 14 days.
POLICY_701__BOOKINGEARLYIS:
Booking early is ideal as fares tend to go up closer to departure date. Here you can define how many days
              before departure a flight becomes Out of Policy. For a Director traveler our
              recommendation is to set the lead time at 7 days.
POLICY_702__BOOKINGEARLYIS:
Booking early is ideal as fares tend to go up closer to departure date. Here you can define how many days
              before departure a flight becomes Out of Policy. For an Executive traveler our
              recommendation is to set the lead time at 0 days.
POLICY_704__WEHAVETWO:
We have two different settings for approval requests. For this type of
          policy we recommend Soft Out of Policy.
POLICY_706__APPROVERSONLYRECEIVE: Approvers only receive notifications for out of policy bookings with an option to decline them.
POLICY_708__APPROVERSRECEIVENOTIFICATION: Approvers receive notifications for every booking with an option to decline them.
POLICY_709__APPROVERSRECEIVENOTIFICATION:
Approvers receive notifications for every booking with an option to approve or decline them. If not actioned upon within
        the approval window, then the system will automatically decline.
POLICY_711__APPROVERSRECEIVENOTIFICATION:
Approvers receive notifications for out of policy bookings with an option to approve or decline them. If not actioned
        upon within the approval window, then the system will automatically decline.
POLICY_713__ASANAPPROVER:
As an approver, you will be notified of any of your travelers' Out of
            Policy bookings and can cancel them. If you do not decline them on time, the bookings will be confirmed.
POLICY_715__ALLYOURUNSAVED:
All your unsaved changes will be lost if you continue. Are you sure you want to leave this page and discard your
      changes?
POLICY_720__AREYOUSURE: Are you sure you want to delete this policy?
POLICY_733__THISFIELDCANNOT:
This field cannot be
            less than one
